SEQUENCE.COMMENT: uxlrLookup - service for performing cross reference lookups by keys/values

array.name: field_options
array.value: SIMPLE - Perform a simple, 1-keyset, 1-valueset type lookup (returns 1 record or an error)
MULTIREC - Perform a multi-record lookup (returns 0 to n records or an error)

array.name: field_options
array.value: 0 - If an error occurs, return the status value and message (default)
1 - If an error occurs, trip the error handler

array.name: field_options
array.value: SIMPLE - Perform a simple, 1-keyset, 1-valueset type lookup (returns 1 record or an error)
MULTIREC - Perform a multi-record lookup (returns 0 to n records or an error)

array.name: field_options
array.value: 0 - If an error occurs, return the status value and message (default)
1 - If an error occurs, trip the error handler

array.name: field_options
array.value: SIMPLE - Perform a simple, 1-keyset, 1-valueset type lookup (returns 1 record or an error) (default)
MULTIREC - Perform a multi-record lookup (returns 0 to n records or an error)
DEFAULT - Performs a default-style lookup (not yet available)

array.name: field_options
array.value: 0 - If an error occurs, return the status value and message (default)
1 - If an error occurs, trip the error handler

array.value: SIMPLE - Perform a simple, 1-keyset, 1-valueset type lookup (returns 1 record or an error)
MULTIREC - Perform a multi-record lookup (returns 0 to n records or an error)

1 - If an error occurs, trip the error handler

MULTIREC - Perform a multi-record lookup (returns 0 to n records or an error)

SEQUENCE.COMMENT: read the metadata about the tablecode (number of defined keys and values)

MAP.COMMENT: sSql = 'SELECT * FROM TUXLR WHERE fKey00='0-uxlr' AND fKey01='tabledata' AND fKey02='%isaUxlrKeyIn[0]%'

array.name: field_options
array.value: SIMPLE - Perform a simple, 1-keyset, 1-valueset type lookup (returns 1 record or an error)
MULTIREC - Perform a multi-record lookup (returns 0 to n records or an error)

array.name: field_options
array.value: 0 - If an error occurs, return the status value and message (default)
1 - If an error occurs, trip the error handler

SEQUENCE.COMMENT: build an SQL string from the set of input keys and values and execute it

MAP.COMMENT: sSql = 'SELECT * FROM TUXLR WHERE ' and sIndex = -1

array.name: field_options
array.value: SIMPLE - Perform a simple, 1-keyset, 1-valueset type lookup (returns 1 record or an error) (default)
MULTIREC - Perform a multi-record lookup (returns 0 to n records or an error)

array.name: field_options
array.value: 0 - If an error occurs, return the status value and message (default)
1 - If an error occurs, trip the error handler

MAP.COMMENT: sIndex = $iteration - 1 $iteration starts at 1 in this loop so subtract one to get what we need

array.value: SIMPLE - Perform a simple, 1-keyset, 1-valueset type lookup (returns 1 record or an error)

true

MAP.COMMENT: sSql = replace( sSql, " fKey00='ECM2EDI' ", " (fKey00='ECM2EDI' OR fKey00='ECM2EDINA') " )

MULTIREC - Perform a multi-record lookup (returns 0 to n records or an error)

array.name: field_options
array.value: 0 - If an error occurs, return the status value and message (default)
1 - If an error occurs, trip the error handler

MAP.COMMENT: UPDATE TUXLR SET FDATEACCESSED='%sDateAccessed%' WHERE fKey00='%dbUxlrRecset/results/FKEY00%' ... AND fKey11='%dbUxlrRecset/results/FKEY11%'

array.name: field_options
array.value: SIMPLE - Perform a simple, 1-keyset, 1-valueset type lookup (returns 1 record or an error)

array.name: field_options

1 - If an error occurs, trip the error handler

Values.value: UPDATE TUXLR SET FDATEACCESSED='%sDateAccessed%' WHERE fKey00='%dbUxlrRecset/results/FKEY00%' AND fKey01='%dbUxlrRecset/results/FKEY01%' AND fKey02='%dbUxlrRecset/results/FKEY02%' AND fKey03='%dbUxlrRecset/results/FKEY03%' AND fKey04='%dbUxlrRecset/results/FKEY04%' AND fKey05='%dbUxlrRecset/results/FKEY05%' AND fKey06='%dbUxlrRecset/results/FKEY06%' AND fKey07='%dbUxlrRecset/results/FKEY07%' AND fKey08='%dbUxlrRecset/results/FKEY08%' AND fKey09='%dbUxlrRecset/results/FKEY09%' AND fKey10='%dbUxlrRecset/results/FKEY10%' AND fKey11='%dbUxlrRecset/results/FKEY11%'
